title: scutellaria altissima subsp. commutata
intro: Scutellaria altissima subsp. commutata, also known as tall skullcap or bigleaf skullcap, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Scutellaria altissima subsp. commutata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and enhance overall well-being.
